reference_product: Amoxicillin 250mg and 500mg Capsules - EMC patient leaflet

sections.text: The leaflet explains what the medicine is for and when it should be used.
The leaflet explains how much to take, how often to take it, and what to do if a dose is missed.
The leaflet explains who must not take the medicine, including relevant allergy restrictions.
The leaflet includes warnings and precautions for safe use.
The leaflet lists possible side effects and what to do if they occur.
The leaflet explains how to store the medicine safely.
